subcodes.first_line: O Ibrahim! A Friend hath appeared from God, and the Hand of Divine Providence hath preserved Him from the fire of the souls of the ungodly [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابراهیم یک خلیل من عندالله ظاهر و ید عنایت حق او را از نار انفس مشرکه حفظ
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @martyrs and martyrdom, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
